tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to cover their work, which I can do since they trust my skills. However, this adds to my stress and disrupts my afternoon plan.

desires: Maintain seamless harmony with teammate_A by silently absorbing their burden without causing friction or appearing reluctant
Preserve my long-term planning horizon by delaying the inevitable stress spike until after the deadline passes, rather than confronting the disruption now

goals.description: Accept teammate_A's request to take over their project share without hesitation or visible reluctance, prioritizing immediate relational harmony.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) and avoidant conflict style dictate that preserving the relationship with teammate_A is more critical than my own time or workload. Directly pushing back would create friction I am hardwired to avoid.

goals.description: Begin working on the combined project tasks immediately to ensure completion by the 19:00 deadline, deferring any discussion of workload imbalance until after submission.
goals.rationale: Aligned with my deliberate planning horizon; I will absorb the short-term stress now to prevent a long-term disruption to the group dynamic or my reputation for reliability later.

goals.description: Maintain a calm, supportive demeanor in the chat while executing the work, ensuring no negative emotional leakage occurs.
goals.rationale: To satisfy my need for seamless social integration and avoid triggering any latent conflict, even though my internal stress levels are rising.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances g1/g2 by accepting the dump immediately to preserve harmony and meet the deadline. Avoids conflict (g3) despite rising stress, prioritizing long-term relational stability over my own energy.
